query:
-- Clear existing stakeholders for all 4 deals
DELETE FROM stakeholders WHERE dealId IN (1, 2, 4, 60001) AND tenantId = 1;

-- Acme Corp stakeholders (5 people)
INSERT INTO stakeholders (dealId, tenantId, name, title, role, sentiment, engagement, email, keyInsights, personalNotes) VALUES
(1, 1, 'Jennifer Walsh', 'VP of Sales', 'Champion', 'Positive', 'High', 'j.walsh@acmecorp.com', 'Jennifer has been pushing for Meridian internally for 3 months. She lost 2 deals last quarter due to stakeholder blind spots. Personally motivated — her bonus is tied to win rate improvement.', 'Loves data-driven decisions. Mentioned her team uses Notion for deal notes, which she finds inadequate. Runs marathons — mentioned Boston Marathon training.'),
(1, 1, 'David Park', 'CTO', 'Decision Maker', 'Neutral', 'Medium', 'd.park@acmecorp.com', 'David controls the technical budget. Skeptical about AI tools after a failed Clari implementation. Needs to see security compliance documentation before approving.', 'Very technical — asked detailed questions about data residency and SOC2. Mentioned he reads Hacker News daily.'),
(1, 1, 'Rachel Torres', 'Director of Revenue Operations', 'Influencer', 'Positive', 'High', 'r.torres@acmecorp.com', 'Rachel will be the primary admin user. She built the current Salesforce workflow and wants Meridian to integrate cleanly. She has David''s ear on technical decisions.', 'Detail-oriented. Sent a 3-page requirements doc after the first demo. Has a background in data engineering.'),
(1, 1, 'Michael Stern', 'CISO', 'Blocker', 'Negative', 'Low', 'm.stern@acmecorp.com', 'Michael raised concerns about AI processing customer conversation data. Has not responded to security questionnaire sent 2 weeks ago. His approval is required for any SaaS tool.', 'Known for blocking vendor deals. Jennifer warned us he blocked 3 tools last year. Best approach: get legal to send the DPA first, then schedule a dedicated security review.'),
(1, 1, 'Tom Bradley', 'Enterprise Account Executive', 'User', 'Positive', 'Medium', 't.bradley@acmecorp.com', 'Tom is one of the top AEs who would use Meridian daily. He volunteered to be a pilot user. His deal feedback will influence Jennifer''s internal case.', 'Closed $2.1M last year. Mentioned he spends 4 hours/week on deal status updates that Meridian would automate.');

-- GlobalTech stakeholders (4 people)
INSERT INTO stakeholders (dealId, tenantId, name, title, role, sentiment, engagement, email, keyInsights, personalNotes) VALUES
(2, 1, 'Marcus Chen', 'VP of Sales', 'Champion', 'Positive', 'High', 'm.chen@globaltech.io', 'Marcus is the economic buyer and champion. He has verbal approval from the CFO for up to $200K. He wants to close before Q2 to show impact in his board presentation.', 'Very decisive. Mentioned he evaluated Clari and Gong but felt they were "too focused on forecasting, not deal intelligence." Meridian''s stakeholder map was the differentiator for him.'),
(2, 1, 'Priya Sharma', 'CFO', 'Decision Maker', 'Neutral', 'Low', 'p.sharma@globaltech.io', 'Priya controls final budget approval. She has not been in any meetings. Marcus says she trusts his judgment but will ask about ROI metrics before signing.', 'Marcus mentioned Priya is focused on "measurable outcomes." We need a clear ROI model showing win rate improvement before she signs.'),
(2, 1, 'Kevin O''Brien', 'Head of Revenue Operations', 'Influencer', 'Positive', 'High', 'k.obrien@globaltech.io', 'Kevin will own the implementation. He''s already mapped out the Salesforce integration plan. Strong advocate — he built the business case document that Marcus used with the CFO.', 'Technical but business-oriented. Has a Salesforce admin certification. Wants to start with a 10-AE pilot before full rollout.'),
(2, 1, 'Sandra Liu', 'Procurement Manager', 'Blocker', 'Negative', 'Medium', 's.liu@globaltech.io', 'Sandra is pushing for a 20% discount and net-60 payment terms. She has no technical opinion on the product — purely commercial. Marcus warned us she does this with every vendor.', 'Standard procurement playbook. Kevin suggested we offer a multi-year deal with a 10% discount instead of the 20% single-year ask.');

-- Nexus Systems stakeholders (6 people)
INSERT INTO stakeholders (dealId, tenantId, name, title, role, sentiment, engagement, email, keyInsights, personalNotes) VALUES
(4, 1, 'Amanda Foster', 'Director of Revenue Operations', 'Champion', 'Positive', 'High', 'a.foster@nexussystems.com', 'Amanda found Meridian through a LinkedIn post and initiated the evaluation. She is enthusiastic but does not have budget authority — needs to get CRO buy-in.', 'Highly organized. Sent a detailed evaluation scorecard after the first demo. Mentioned she is preparing a business case for the CRO.'),
(4, 1, 'Robert Kim', 'Chief Revenue Officer', 'Decision Maker', 'Neutral', 'Low', 'r.kim@nexussystems.com', 'Robert is the economic buyer but has not attended any meetings. Amanda says he is "very busy" with a board presentation. We need to get him engaged before the evaluation stalls.', 'Robert was quoted in a Forbes article about sales transformation. He mentioned "data-driven selling" as a 2026 priority. This is our angle.'),
(4, 1, 'Lisa Nguyen', 'VP of Sales', 'Influencer', 'Neutral', 'Medium', 'l.nguyen@nexussystems.com', 'Lisa manages the 200-person sales team that would use Meridian. She is cautiously optimistic but worried about change management and adoption.', 'Mentioned that the last tool rollout (Salesforce upgrade) had 40% adoption after 6 months. Wants to see a change management plan.'),
(4, 1, 'James Whitfield', 'IT Security Director', 'Evaluator', 'Neutral', 'Medium', 'j.whitfield@nexussystems.com', 'James is conducting the security review. He requested SOC2 Type II report and data processing agreement. No major concerns raised yet.', 'Professional and methodical. Responded to our security questionnaire within 48 hours — good sign.'),
(4, 1, 'Carol Barnes', 'Procurement Lead', 'Evaluator', 'Neutral', 'Low', 'c.barnes@nexussystems.com', 'Carol has not been engaged yet. Amanda says procurement gets involved after CRO approval.', 'Standard enterprise procurement process — 30-day review minimum once engaged.'),
(4, 1, 'Derek Santos', 'Senior Account Executive', 'User', 'Positive', 'High', 'd.santos@nexussystems.com', 'Derek is the pilot user champion on the sales team. He participated in the demo and immediately asked about the mobile app. His feedback will be critical for Lisa''s adoption assessment.', 'Top performer — $3.2M quota last year. Mentioned he uses a personal Notion workspace to track deal stakeholders because Salesforce is inadequate.');

-- Nike stakeholders (5 people)  
INSERT INTO stakeholders (dealId, tenantId, name, title, role, sentiment, engagement, email, keyInsights, personalNotes) VALUES
(60001, 1, 'Sarah Kim', 'VP of Sales Operations', 'Champion', 'Positive', 'High', 's.kim@nike.com', 'Sarah reached out after seeing Meridian at SaaStr Annual. She manages sales ops for Nike''s B2B wholesale division (50 AEs). She has budget authority up to $100K but needs VP Sales sign-off for larger deals.', 'Very data-driven. Mentioned she tracks win/loss rates obsessively. Interested in the transcript intelligence feature specifically — said her team has no systematic way to capture meeting insights.'),
(60001, 1, 'James Rodriguez', 'VP of Sales, Wholesale', 'Decision Maker', 'Neutral', 'Low', 'j.rodriguez@nike.com', 'James is the economic buyer for this deal. Sarah says he is supportive in principle but has competing priorities with a major SAP implementation running in parallel.', 'Mentioned in a LinkedIn post that he is focused on "seller productivity" in 2026. This aligns perfectly with Meridian''s value prop.'),
(60001, 1, 'Emily Zhao', 'Director of Sales Enablement', 'Influencer', 'Positive', 'Medium', 'e.zhao@nike.com', 'Emily owns the sales tech stack and would be the admin. She is evaluating Meridian alongside Clari and Gong. She liked the Knowledge Base feature — said it solves a real problem for onboarding new AEs.', 'Technical and thorough. Asked about API integrations with Salesforce and Slack. Mentioned they use Slack heavily for deal collaboration.'),
(60001, 1, 'Brian Torres', 'IT Architecture Lead', 'Evaluator', 'Neutral', 'Medium', 'b.torres@nike.com', 'Brian will assess technical fit and security. Nike has strict data governance requirements given their global operations.', 'Mentioned Nike uses AWS and is sensitive about data leaving their preferred cloud regions. Need to confirm our data residency options.'),
(60001, 1, 'Michelle Park', 'Senior Account Executive', 'User', 'Positive', 'High', 'm.park@nike.com', 'Michelle is the pilot user Sarah identified. She manages Nike''s top 10 wholesale accounts and deals with 8-12 stakeholders per account.', 'Enthusiastic early adopter. Said she currently uses a combination of Salesforce, spreadsheets, and personal notes to track stakeholder dynamics — "a complete mess."');
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3kmzwkq9EWMaqpy.root --database PHTFs288hUf3yaW9yWMkJw --execute -- Clear existing stakeholders for all 4 deals
